title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 67.2835 - Allocation of state's residual share of certain bond limitation
text:
67.2835.  Allocation of state's residual share of certain bond limitation. — The director of the department of economic development is authorized to allocate the state's residual share, or any portion thereof, of the national qualified energy conservation bond limitation under Section 54D of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, as amended, for any purposes described therein to the authority, any clean energy development board, the state, any political subdivision, instrumentality, or other body corporate and politic.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al.)
